title: ASTS Institutional Holdings and Ownership Analysis
text: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) has 578 institutional owners and shareholders that have filed 13D/G or 13F forms with the Securities Exchange Commission (SEC), holding a total of 150,406,904 shares. Morgan Stanley removed 912,357 shares (-22.0%) from their portfolio in Q3 2025, for an estimated $44,778,481, indicating that Morgan Stanley was a notable institutional holder but reduced its position during the third quarter of 2025. In contrast, Vanguard Group Inc added 2,351,539 shares (+13.4%) to their portfolio in Q3 2025, for an estimated $115,413,534. The largest shareholders include Rakuten, Inc., Vanguard Group Inc, and Susquehanna International Group, LLP. The institutional ownership data shows diversified backing from major investment firms, though some institutions like Morgan Stanley are reducing exposure while others like Vanguard are increasing positions.
